description_long: This chaise features a light wood frame with a distinctive open lattice design along the backrest and armrests, giving it an airy and contemporary appearance. The backrest curves gently, providing ergonomic support, and is visually defined by crisscrossing wooden slats that create a diamond pattern. Both armrests are integrated into the frame and mirror the lattice motif, adding to the cohesive design. The seat is topped with a single, thick, light-colored cushion that appears to be upholstered in a smooth, solid fabric, offering comfort and contrast to the wooden structure. The legs are straight and sturdy, matching the frame's wood tone and finish, and are positioned at the corners for stability. The overall look is modern yet natural, making it suitable for urban parks, patios, or stylish public seating areas.
description: A modern chaise with a light wood lattice frame, curved backrest, and a single thick, light-colored cushion. The design is open, airy, and visually striking, blending comfort with contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, cushioned seat, the open lattice armrests, and the symmetrical, crisscrossed backrest design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gentle curve of the backrest, the depth of the cushion, and the open lattice pattern along the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full diamond-patterned lattice backrest and the rounded contour of the frame.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest's lattice structure and the seat's thickness.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium height, gently curved, and features a visually striking open lattice of crisscrossed wooden slats forming a diamond pattern. It is continuous with the armrests and has no additional padding or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, integrated into the frame, and feature the same open lattice design as the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of the same light wood as the frame, with a simple, unadorned finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery on the seat cushion is solid and smooth, with no visible pattern, tufting, or quilting, and appears to be a single piece of light-colored fabric.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, rectangular seat cushion placed on the frame, with no additional back or side cushions visible. The cushion is fitted to the seat and appears to be attached or snugly placed.
